requirement_text: A4 paper is required
notes: PDF is A4.

requirement_text: Line spacing must be between 1.5 and 2

evidence: main.tex line 7; nominal text block 170 mm by 257 mm
notes: Configured margin exceeds the minimum.

requirement_text: Page number must be centered at the top

requirement_text: Hebrew and English abstracts must have the same format
